element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary offensive tool throughout; max distance equals screen height
Stress relief mechanic; clears screen of bullets and damages enemies in blast radius
Destroyable enemies that spawn bomb replenishment items (B icons)
Destroyable enemies spawning S power-ups and point bonuses
Core avoidance mechanic; hit causes life loss and firepower reset to initial state
Landing grants 3000 point bonus and multiplies bomb stock; serves as progression checkpoint
Destroyed on enemy hit; resets to initial state; accumulated through play
Each stage increases in difficulty; second loop increases further with higher bullet speeds
Major enemies requiring sustained fire or bomb use

typical_relief_triggers: Firing bomb (explicitly designed as stress relief)
typical_tension_triggers: Waves of enemy planes with aimed fire
Loss of firepower after taking hit
Second loop with increased bullet speeds
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous vertical scroll creates unrelenting forward momentum; tension builds across stages with increasing enemy density and accuracy; bomb mechanic provides periodic stress relief windows; checkpoint system manages progression pressure

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stage 1 deliberately designed for beginning players; basic enemy patterns and moderate projectile speeds; introduces all core mechanics (shot, bomb, avoidance, firepower scaling)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-4 progressively increase enemy density, aerial accuracy, and ground unit complexity; firepower management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 5 represents peak difficulty; most challenging military force composition; bullet speeds increase significantly on second loop
notable_spikes: Stage 2: First difficulty jump from beginner-focused Stage 1
Second loop completion: Bullet speed increases substantially; enemies gain improved aiming
Stage 5: Maximum difficulty before loop restart

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Continuous vertical scroll with staged enemy introduction
notable_level_patterns.description: Background scrolls constantly until runway reached; enemies introduced in waves progressing from ground units to aerial formations; no backtracking or horizontal maze-like navigation
Runway landings (beyond initial takeoff) serve as both narrative checkpoints and scoring opportunities; downed players restart at last reached checkpoint; bomb stock multiplies for 3000 point bonus

Completing Stage 5 triggers second loop with higher starting difficulty; bullet speeds increase and enemies aim more accurately; designed for accumulated knowledge mastery rather than single-pass completion
